rationale: For a highly technical Gann trading dashboard with explosive/Godzilla scanners, the UI must feel like an elite, tactical command center. High contrast (Deep Obsidian + Pure White) ensures data readability, while Electric Green/Blaze Red provide immediate signal recognition.

structure.container: min-h-screen bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white overflow-hidden flex flex-col
structure.header: h-16 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center justify-between px-6 bg-[#0A0A0A]/90 backdrop-blur-md z-50
structure.main_grid: flex-1 grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-px bg-white/10

surface_strategies.panels: Use 'Grid Borders' look. Panels shouldn't float like cards; they should fill the grid with 1px solid borders separating them. No border-radius for outer panels to maintain the terminal look. Inner widgets can have max rounded-sm (2px).
surface_strategies.buttons: Flat, sharp edges (rounded-none). High contrast hover states. Primary buttons: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200. Signal buttons: bg-signal text-black.
surface_strategies.inputs: bg-black border-white/20 focus:border-white focus:ring-0 rounded-none font-mono text-sm

feature_guidelines.search: Command Palette style, fixed at top of center column or header. Use Cmd+K shortcut. Large mono font for ticker symbols.
feature_guidelines.candlestick_gann_chart: Occupies center_chart. Dark background, no gridlines or very faint 5% opacity. Gann Fan lines must originate from user-selected pivot (or lowest low) radiating upwards. Use distinct color for 1x1 (45-degree) angle.
feature_guidelines.square_of_9: A dynamic CSS Grid. Center cell (1) highlighted. Cardinal cross (horizontal/vertical) and Ordinal cross (diagonals) must have distinct background tints (e.g., bg-white/5). Cell numbers in mono font.

signal_scanners.falling_knife: Use red/orange highlights. High volume/sharp drop indicators.
signal_scanners.godzilla: Use aggressive pink/red (#FF0055) glowing text/badges for extreme volume breakouts.
signal_scanners.demon_confluence: Show as a progress/radar or stacked horizontal bar chart with 0-100 score.
signal_scanners.ghost_mode: Auto-scanner toggle. When ON, pulse a neon purple (#A855F7) indicator in the header.

feature_guidelines.signal_badges: Solid background, black text. Extremely crisp. e.g. `BUY`

animations.data_tick: When price or signal updates, flash background color (green/red) briefly and fade to transparent over 500ms.
animations.scanner_sweep: For Ghost Mode, a slow translating linear gradient line moving top-to-bottom across the scanner list to indicate 'scanning'.
animations.hover: Instant background color change, no slow CSS transitions. Makes UI feel faster.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Ensure you import 'Chivo', 'IBM Plex Sans', and 'JetBrains Mono' via Google Fonts.
INSTALL ICONS: Use Phosphor Icons (`@phosphor-icons/react`) for sharp, technical iconography suitable for trading terminals.
USE RECHARTS/CUSTOM SVG: For the candlestick chart, you may need to build a custom SVG-based Gann Fan overlay on top of Recharts or a lightweight canvas library.
SQUARE OF 9 ALGORITHM: Implement the mathematical spiral algorithm in JS to populate a responsive CSS grid.
STRICT GRID BORDERS: Do not use floating cards with shadows. Use `border-r border-b border-white/10` to divide sections, creating a flush 'Bloomberg Terminal' aesthetic.
NO INTER FONT: Do not use Inter. Strictly use Chivo for headers, IBM Plex for body, and JetBrains Mono for all numbers/tickers.
TEST IDS: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements (search, timeframe selectors, scanner rows, badges).
